name: TypeId
description: Unique runtime identifier used to tag `D1Client` values.

name: D1Client
description:
Service tag for the Cloudflare D1 SQL client.

**When to use**

Use to access or provide a Cloudflare D1 SQL client through the Effect
context.

name: make
description: Creates a scoped Cloudflare D1 SQL client. Prepared statements are cached, while transactions and streaming queries are not supported by this driver.
signature: declare const make: (options: D1ClientConfig) => Effect.Effect<D1Client, never, Scope.Scope | Reactivity.Reactivity>

name: layerConfig
description: Creates a layer from a `Config`-wrapped D1 client configuration, providing both `D1Client` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layerConfig: (config: Config.Wrap<D1ClientConfig>) => Layer.Layer<D1Client | Client.SqlClient, Config.ConfigError>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer from a concrete D1 client configuration, providing both `D1Client` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layer: (config: D1ClientConfig) => Layer.Layer<D1Client | Client.SqlClient, Config.ConfigError>

name: D1Client
description: Cloudflare D1 SQL client service, extending `SqlClient` with its D1 configuration and no `updateValues` support.

name: D1ClientConfig
description: Configuration for a Cloudflare D1 client, including the `D1Database`, prepared statement cache settings, span attributes, and query/result name transforms.
signature:
export interface D1ClientConfig {
  readonly db: D1Database
  readonly prepareCacheSize?: number | undefined
  readonly prepareCacheTTL?: Duration.Input | undefined
  readonly spanAttributes?: Record<string, unknown> | undefined

  readonly transformResultNames?: ((str: string) => string) | undefined
  readonly transformQueryNames?: ((str: string) => string) | undefined
}

name: TypeId
description: Type-level literal for the `D1Client` runtime identifier.

name: D1Client
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./D1Client.ts" module as `D1Client`.
